summary: Completed comprehensive testing of aggregated stock feature for dairy manufacturing inventory management. Backend APIs 100% working. Frontend UI correctly displays aggregated data by SKU (finished products) and product name (semi-finished). Dispatch uses SKU-based selection with FIFO deduction. All navigation working.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with aggregated stock counts
Dashboard low stock alerts show SKU names (e.g., 'paneer - 1kg', 'Paneer- 180 gm')
GET /api/finished-products-summary returns aggregated data by SKU
GET /api/semi-finished-summary returns aggregated data by product name
GET /api/reports/product-stock returns aggregated semi-finished and finished data
Product Stock Report page shows ONE row per product (aggregated)
Finished Products & Dispatch page shows aggregated stock by SKU (6 unique SKUs)
Dispatch form uses SKU dropdown with stock info
Semi-Finished Products page shows aggregated stock by product name (3 products)
Packing form uses SKU select dropdown
GET /api/packing-history-by-product/{product_name} returns history across all batches
Raw Material Stock page CRUD operations (create, edit, delete)
Navigation between all pages works correctly
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Aggregated stock feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: /api/finished-products-summary (by SKU), /api/semi-finished-summary (by product name), /api/reports/product-stock (both). Dispatch accepts {sku, quantity} format. Packing uses /api/packing-by-product endpoint. Dashboard low_stock_products returns {sku, unit, current_stock} objects.
